lines.speaker: Jittery Jim
lines.text: Are you one of them?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: One of them? What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Jittery Jim
lines.text: Hmm... It's none of your concern. Move along.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh go on, tell me?

lines.speaker: Jittery Jim
lines.text: What's this game you're playing? Are you with them?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are they?

lines.speaker: Jittery Jim
lines.text: Khazard's dogs!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right... Well, no, I'm not with them.

lines.speaker: Jittery Jim
lines.text: Good. They've decided they don't like me too much, what with me killing about eight of them...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I can see why that might have upset them. Anyway, I think I'm going to head off now, but good luck with... everything.

lines.speaker: Jittery Jim
lines.text: Hmm...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I can see why that might have upset them. Perhaps it might be wise for you to put some distance between you and them.

lines.speaker: Jittery Jim
lines.text: Is that you making me an offer?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm afraid not. At some point I hope to hire a crew to sail with, but I'm not really ready for that yet.

lines.speaker: Jittery Jim
lines.text: Hmm... Well, maybe you should let me know when you are...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I guess you could join my crew.

lines.speaker: Jittery Jim
lines.text: Hmm... I don't know... You say you're not one of them, but I reckon you're trying to fool me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I guess you could join my crew.

lines.speaker: Jittery Jim
lines.text: Hmm... Dogs can't swim, can they? Yes... I think this might work...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I don't think so.

lines.speaker: Jittery Jim
lines.text: Hmm... If you say so.

lines.speaker: Jittery Jim
lines.text: You again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see you're still here. Do you not think it would be best if you put some distance between yourself and this place?

lines.speaker: Jittery Jim
lines.text: Is that you making me an offer?

lines.speaker: Jittery Jim
lines.text: Captain.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. How are things going?

lines.speaker: Jittery Jim
lines.text: Being on your crew is keeping me one step ahead of them, Captain, and that's all I ask.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It must be scary living in your own head...

lines.speaker: Jittery Jim
lines.text: The fear keeps me safe, Captain.
